title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
